slides.title: Why This Matters
slides.subtitle: Edge privacy and distributed intelligence are driving the architecture.

slides.title: Problem Statement
slides.lead: Traditional centralized training is expensive and privacy-sensitive in IoT environments.
bullets: Raw sensor data is costly to transmit continuously.
Devices have heterogeneous compute and unstable connectivity.
Data ownership constraints make central aggregation risky.

slides.title: Key Takeaways
bullets: Keep slides structured and visually varied.
Prefer a local script over hand-authoring OOXML.
